_comments.search_type: hybrid outperforms vector-only or keyword-only by 15-25%
_comments.top_k: 5 chunks provides enough context without noise. Increase to 10 for broad topics.
_comments.relevance_threshold: 0.78 filters irrelevant matches. Lower to 0.65 for recall-focused use cases.
_comments.hybrid_weights: 60/40 vector/keyword works for most enterprise docs. Flip to 40/60 for highly structured data.
